description: Universal clinical vocabulary shared across every Tabibu hospital: vital signs, visit diagnoses, and clinical assessment structure. These concepts are globally standard — they do not require Kenya/SHA-specific curation.

notes.1114: Vital signs (ConvSet) — cascades to all vital sign questions and answer sets (~93 concepts)
notes.159947: Visit diagnoses (ConvSet) — cascades to provisional/final diagnosis structure and ICD-10 mapped findings (~112 concepts)
notes.1729: Sign/symptom present — cascades to clinical assessment and symptom documentation concepts (~28 concepts)
